meaning: n.冰雨,雨夹雪vi.下雨雪,下冰雹
examples: At any time I could run into rain, sleet, snow, or scorching heat.
By the time they reached the mountaintop, the sleet had changed to fluffy snow.
Parts of Northwest China, Inner Mongolia, North and Northeast China will see small to moderate snow or sleet.
Armstrong trains longer and harder than 99% of pro cyclists, year round, in heat or sleet.
Four to eight inches of snow are expected, along with high winds and sleet.
